mulliganDescriptions.london: Draw 7 cards every time. When you keep, put one card on the bottom for each effective mulligan.
mulliganDescriptions.vancouver: Each effective mulligan draws one fewer card. If you keep after an effective mulligan, you scry 1.
mulliganDescriptions.paris: Each effective mulligan draws one fewer card. You do not put cards on the bottom of your library or scry.
mulliganDescriptions.generous: Commander-friendly rule: draw up to 10 cards, keep 7 when possible, and put the rest on the bottom of your library in random order.

form.name: Name
form.textModeAllDescription: Both boxes must appear in the card rules text.
form.textModeAnyDescription: Either box can match the card rules text.
form.textExactDescription: Match complete words only, not text inside longer words.
form.includeVariablePowerDescription: Also include cards whose power is not a fixed number, such as * or 1+*.
form.includeVariableToughnessDescription: Also include cards whose toughness is not a fixed number, such as * or 1+*.
form.textAPlaceholder: Draw a card, destroy target, whenever you cast...

help.title: Search guide
help.heading: Advanced search guide
help.name: Search by full or partial card name. CommanderZone checks canonical names, printed/localized names and flavor names when the local catalog has them, so localized and English names can find the same card.
help.text: Use one or two rule-text terms. The match toggle decides whether both boxes must appear on the card or whether either box is enough. Text is checked across oracle text and card faces.
help.subtypes: Subtype works independently from type. You can combine it with any other section to find things like Elf, Goblin, Dragon, Equipment or Aura.
help.rarity: You can select several rarities at once. The colored pills are only a visual aid; the search still uses the catalog rarity.
help.colors: Color match controls how selected printed colors behave: any selected color, all selected colors, or exactly that color set. Artifact, multicolor and land are additional shortcuts.
help.costs: Mana value uses CommanderZone's normalized card catalog, where X counts as 0. Exact mana cost is built with the symbol picker, so you do not need to type color codes.
help.stats: Power and toughness ranges compare numeric values. Enable the small variable-value checkbox when you also want cards with values such as * or 1+*.

meta.title: Contact us
meta.description: Contact CommanderZone for support, bug reports, rights issues, or general questions.

hero.title: Contact us
hero.description: Send us a message and we will review it as soon as possible.

copy.supportBody: Use this form for support, bug reports, privacy requests, rights-related issues, or any question, idea, or curiosity you would like to share with us. If that is easier for you, we can also continue by email at {{ email }}.
copy.includeBody: Explain the issue clearly and include any useful page, room, deck, or screenshot context. Do not send secrets or payment details.

form.submitRateLimitError: You have reached the contact limit. Please wait about {{ retryAfterMinutes }} minute(s) before trying again. If it is urgent, write to {{ email }} directly.
form.submitError: We could not send your message. Write to {{ email }} directly or contact us through another channel.
